name: RKR - Rush Kill Repeat
short_description: You're bleeding out. Every kill adds seconds. Survive a top-down, procedurally generated maze where time is your primary enemy.
detailed_description:
You're bleeding out. Every kill adds seconds. Survive a top-down, procedurally generated maze where time is your #1 enemy.

Dive headfirst into roguelite chaos as you RUSH through procedurally-generated levels, each teeming with foes hungry for your blood. Mercilessly KILL everything that stands in your way to claim control of your own personal labyrinth of nightmares. REPEAT the challenge until victory is yours, or until your inevitable demise.

RKR - Rush Kill Repeat FEATURES:

  • Immersive Environments: Navigate through diverse environments such as slippery ice caves and dimly lit passages, each with its own unique music track, adding depth to your journey.

  • High-Stakes Combat: Your enemies die in one shot. But so do you. Exercise precision and caution as you navigate through the maze, ensuring that every shot counts.

  • Large Arsenal: Discover new, powerful weapons to help push your journey further.

  • Procedurally Generated Mazes: Experience endless replayability with procedurally generated levels, ensuring that every run offers a fresh and unpredictable challenge.
